name: svg-stroke-trace
title: SVG Stroke Trace
description: An authored SVG path draws from its measured length, holds with subtle drift, and optionally fills when the path is closed.
evidence: Video Primitives Wave I I5 svg-stroke-trace contract

variables.label: Path
variables.description: SVG path data for the authored mark.

variables.label: Stroke width
variables.description: Width of the traced stroke in SVG viewBox units.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Color used by the trace and optional fill.
